title: Irish Smoked BBQ Ribs with Date Glaze
description: A twist on traditional BBQ ribs, featuring a sweet and spicy date glaze paired with the smokiness of Irish smoked bacon.
instructions: Remove the membrane from the back of each rack of ribs.
In a small bowl, mix together brown sugar, smoky paprika, and a pinch of salt. Rub the mixture evenly onto both racks of ribs.
Place the ribs in the smoker and cook for 4 hours, or until the meat starts to pull away from the bone.
While the ribs are cooking, prepare the date glaze by mashing the glazed dates in a bowl.
After 4 hours, brush the ribs with the date glaze and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the smoker and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
